requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (GSO IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: LED light sources and luminaires entering Kuwait are evaluated for photobiological safety using the GSO adoption of IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) within the KUCAS framework administered by PAI. The standard derives a risk group from blue-light weighted radiance and irradiance: RG0 (Exempt — no hazard), RG1 (Low risk), RG2 (Moderate risk), RG3 (High risk). Where photobiological safety is a checked element for the product category, the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report should document the risk-group classification. RG2 and RG3 products carry usage restrictions and require appropriate warnings. The classification is technically grid-independent (it depends on the light output), but the lamp is otherwise rated for the 240 V, 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 进入科威特的 LED 光源及灯具在 KUCAS 框架内（由 PAI 管理）按 GSO 采用的 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估光生物安全。该标准依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度得出危险组别：RG0（豁免——无危害）、RG1（低危险）、RG2（中等危险）、RG3（高危险）。当光生物安全为该产品类别的核查项时，KUCAS 技术评估报告应记录危险组别分类。RG2 和 RG3 产品存在使用限制并须附适当警告。该分类在技术上与电网无关（取决于光输出），但灯在其他方面按 240 V、50 Hz 电源定额。
summary.zht: 進入科威特的 LED 光源及燈具在 KUCAS 框架內（由 PAI 管理）按 GSO 採用的 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估光生物安全。該標準依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度得出危險組別：RG0（豁免——無危害）、RG1（低危險）、RG2（中等危險）、RG3（高危險）。當光生物安全為該產品類別的核查項時，KUCAS 技術評估報告應記錄危險組別分類。RG2 和 RG3 產品存在使用限制並須附適當警告。該分類在技術上與電網無關（取決於光輸出），但燈在其他方面按 240 V、50 Hz 電源定額。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (GSO adoption of IEC 62471, risk-group classification)

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market, with enforcement and testing for residential luminaires being less prescriptive. Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not by themselves accepted for KUCAS conformity.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对中国市场所有 LED 灯具均为强制要求，对居民灯具的执行及检测规定不够严格。中国 GB/T 20145 报告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對中國市場所有 LED 燈具均為強制要求，對居民燈具的執行及檢測規定不夠嚴格。中國 GB/T 20145 報告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: GSO IEC 62471 and GB/T 20145 both derive from IEC 62471, so the underlying test method (deriving an RG0–RG3 risk group) is the same. The gaps are procedural: (1) any photobiological evidence must be presented within the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report via a PAI-recognised body, not reused from a Chinese recommended-standard test report; (2) CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and is often not tested for residential luminaires, so a Chinese manufacturer may have no existing report and must generate one; (3) confirm with PAI whether photobiological safety is a checked element for the specific luminaire category, since GSO/KUCAS evidence requirements vary by product. Manufacturers should document a defensible risk-group classification (commonly RG0/RG1 for general-purpose luminaires) and retain warnings/instructions for any RG2 product.
gap.zh: GSO IEC 62471 与 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，底层试验方法（得出 RG0–RG3 危险组别）相同。差距在于程序：（1）任何光生物证据须通过 PAI 认可机构纳入 KUCAS 技术评估报告，不可直接复用中国推荐性标准检测报告；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，居民灯具常不进行检测，因此中国制造商可能无现成报告而须新出具；（3）须向 PAI 确认光生物安全是否为该具体灯具类别的核查项，因 GSO/KUCAS 证据要求随产品而异。制造商应记录可辩护的危险组别分类（通用灯具通常为 RG0/RG1），并对任何 RG2 产品保留警告/说明。
gap.zht: GSO IEC 62471 與 GB/T 20145 均源自 IEC 62471，底層試驗方法（得出 RG0–RG3 危險組別）相同。差距在於程序：（1）任何光生物證據須通過 PAI 認可機構納入 KUCAS 技術評估報告，不可直接複用中國推薦性標準檢測報告；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，居民燈具常不進行檢測，因此中國製造商可能無現成報告而須新出具；（3）須向 PAI 確認光生物安全是否為該具體燈具類別的核查項，因 GSO/KUCAS 證據要求隨產品而異。製造商應記錄可辯護的危險組別分類（通用燈具通常為 RG0/RG1），並對任何 RG2 產品保留警告/說明。

mandatory_status.target: Applicable within KUCAS — GSO IEC 62471 risk-group classification expected where photobiological safety is a checked element for the category; documented in the KUCAS Technical Evaluation Report (confirm scope with PAI)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification per the GSO adoption of IEC 62471 is the expected method where photobiological safety is a checked element under KUCAS, documented in the Technical Evaluation Report via a PAI-recognised body. The test method matches China's GB/T 20145 (both IEC 62471-derived), but CN GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and often untested for residential luminaires, so a Chinese manufacturer may need to generate a fresh report. Document the risk group (commonly RG0/RG1) and include warnings for any RG2 product. Confirm category scope with PAI.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 当光生物安全为 KUCAS 核查项时，按 GSO 采用的 IEC 62471 进行危险组别分类为预期方法，并通过 PAI 认可机构记录于技术评估报告中。试验方法与中国 GB/T 20145（均源自 IEC 62471）一致，但中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性且居民灯具常未检测，因此中国制造商可能须新出具报告。记录危险组别（通常为 RG0/RG1），并对任何 RG2 产品附警告。请向 PAI 确认类别范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 當光生物安全為 KUCAS 核查項時，按 GSO 採用的 IEC 62471 進行危險組別分類為預期方法，並通過 PAI 認可機構記錄於技術評估報告中。試驗方法與中國 GB/T 20145（均源自 IEC 62471）一致，但中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性且居民燈具常未檢測，因此中國製造商可能須新出具報告。記錄危險組別（通常為 RG0/RG1），並對任何 RG2 產品附警告。請向 PAI 確認類別範圍。

requirement_topic.en: Performance / Colour Quality Declaration (GSO IEC 62612 vs GB)
requirement_topic.zh: 性能/光色质量声明（GSO IEC 62612 与 GB）
requirement_topic.zht: 性能/光色質量聲明（GSO IEC 62612 與 GB）

summary.en: Beyond hazard classification, LED lamp performance and colour quality may be assessed under the GSO adoption of IEC 62612 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements) within the KUCAS framework, covering parameters such as luminous flux maintenance, colour rendering index (CRI/Ra), correlated colour temperature (CCT) tolerance, and rated lifetime claims. Declared photometric/colorimetric values on the product and packaging are expected to be substantiated. This performance evidence is distinct from the safety (GSO IEC 60598-1 / 62560) and energy-efficiency (GSO/Kuwait energy label) requirements, but is part of the overall KUCAS documentation where the product category calls for it. Products are rated for the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait supply.
summary.zh: 除危害分类外，LED 灯的性能及光色质量可在 KUCAS 框架内按 GSO 采用的 IEC 62612（通用照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求）评估，涵盖光通维持率、显色指数（CRI/Ra）、相关色温（CCT）容差及额定寿命声称等参数。产品及包装上声明的光度/色度值应有依据。该性能证据不同于安全（GSO IEC 60598-1 / 62560）及能效（GSO/科威特能效标签）要求，但在产品类别需要时属于整体 KUCAS 文件的一部分。产品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 电源定额。
summary.zht: 除危害分類外，LED 燈的性能及光色質量可在 KUCAS 框架內按 GSO 採用的 IEC 62612（通用照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求）評估，涵蓋光通維持率、顯色指數（CRI/Ra）、相關色溫（CCT）容差及額定壽命聲稱等參數。產品及包裝上聲明的光度/色度值應有依據。該性能證據不同於安全（GSO IEC 60598-1 / 62560）及能效（GSO/科威特能效標籤）要求，但在產品類別需要時屬於整體 KUCAS 文件的一部分。產品按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 電源定額。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (GSO adoption of IEC 62612)

summary.en: China's equivalent performance standard is GB/T 24908 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements), aligned with IEC 62612, covering luminous flux, efficacy, CRI, CCT, and lumen maintenance. GB/T 24908 is a recommended standard. China also enforces energy-efficiency grading via GB 30255-2019 (LED room luminaires) with mandatory China Energy Label registration. Chinese performance reports are not by themselves accepted for KUCAS conformity.
summary.zh: 中国对应性能标准为 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——性能要求），与 IEC 62612 对齐，涵盖光通量、光效、显色指数、色温及光通维持率。GB/T 24908 为推荐性标准。中国还通过 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品）实施能效分级，并强制进行中国能效标识注册。中国性能报告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應性能標準為 GB/T 24908（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——性能要求），與 IEC 62612 對齊，涵蓋光通量、光效、顯色指數、色溫及光通維持率。GB/T 24908 為推薦性標準。中國還通過 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品）實施能效分級，並強制進行中國能效標識註冊。中國性能報告本身不被 KUCAS 符合性所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62612)
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: GSO IEC 62612 and GB/T 24908 share an IEC 62612 base, so the performance test methods are largely the same. The gaps: (1) performance/colour-quality evidence, where required, must be presented within KUCAS via a PAI-recognised body and cannot be reused directly from Chinese reports; (2) declared values must be consistent with what appears on Kuwait-market packaging and with the separate GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label (see ledkw-ecodesign rows); (3) photometric values measured at China's 220 V should be confirmed at the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait condition where voltage affects flux/efficacy. The practical burden is generating or re-issuing performance evidence acceptable to PAI and ensuring on-pack claims (CRI, CCT, lumens, lifetime) are substantiated for the Kuwait market.
gap.zh: GSO IEC 62612 与 GB/T 24908 同以 IEC 62612 为基础，性能试验方法基本相同。差距：（1）如需性能/光色质量证据，须通过 PAI 认可机构纳入 KUCAS，且不可直接复用中国报告；（2）声明值须与科威特市场包装及独立的 GSO/科威特能效标签（见 ledkw-ecodesign 行）一致；（3）在中国 220 V 测得的光度值，应在电压影响光通/光效之处按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 条件确认。实际负担是生成或重新出具为 PAI 所接受的性能证据，并确保包装声称（CRI、CCT、光通量、寿命）在科威特市场有依据。
gap.zht: GSO IEC 62612 與 GB/T 24908 同以 IEC 62612 為基礎，性能試驗方法基本相同。差距：（1）如需性能/光色質量證據，須通過 PAI 認可機構納入 KUCAS，且不可直接複用中國報告；（2）聲明值須與科威特市場包裝及獨立的 GSO/科威特能效標籤（見 ledkw-ecodesign 行）一致；（3）在中國 220 V 測得的光度值，應在電壓影響光通/光效之處按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 條件確認。實際負擔是生成或重新出具為 PAI 所接受的性能證據，並確保包裝聲稱（CRI、CCT、光通量、壽命）在科威特市場有依據。

mandatory_status.target: Applicable within KUCAS — GSO IEC 62612 performance/colour declarations assessed where the product category requires it; declared on-pack values must be substantiated (confirm scope with PAI)
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 24908 is a recommended performance standard; energy-efficiency grading via GB 30255-2019 with China Energy Label is mandatory for in-scope products

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lamp performance and colour quality may be assessed under the GSO adoption of IEC 62612 within KUCAS where the product category calls for it, with declared on-pack values (CRI, CCT, lumens, lifetime) expected to be substantiated. The method matches China's GB/T 24908 (both IEC 62612-derived), but evidence must be presented to PAI and cannot be reused directly from Chinese reports; flux/efficacy should be confirmed at the 240 V, 50 Hz Kuwait condition. This is separate from the GSO/Kuwait energy-efficiency label. Confirm category scope with PAI.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在产品类别需要时，LED 灯的性能及光色质量可在 KUCAS 内按 GSO 采用的 IEC 62612 评估，包装声明值（CRI、CCT、光通量、寿命）应有依据。方法与中国 GB/T 24908（均源自 IEC 62612）一致，但证据须提交 PAI 且不可直接复用中国报告；光通/光效应按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 条件确认。此项独立于 GSO/科威特能效标签。请向 PAI 确认类别范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在產品類別需要時，LED 燈的性能及光色質量可在 KUCAS 內按 GSO 採用的 IEC 62612 評估，包裝聲明值（CRI、CCT、光通量、壽命）應有依據。方法與中國 GB/T 24908（均源自 IEC 62612）一致，但證據須提交 PAI 且不可直接複用中國報告；光通/光效應按科威特 240 V、50 Hz 條件確認。此項獨立於 GSO/科威特能效標籤。請向 PAI 確認類別範圍。
